title: Assessing Humor in Edited News Headlines
description: Rate the funniness of edited news headlines and compare humor between original and edited versions, based on SemEval-2020 Task 7 (Hossain et al.). Headlines are minimally edited by replacing a single word to create humorous effect.
citation:
@inproceedings{hossain-etal-2020-semeval,
    title = "{S}em{E}val-2020 {T}ask 7: {A}ssessing {H}umor in {E}dited {N}ews {H}eadlines",
    author = "Hossain, Nabil  and Krumm, John  and Gamon, Michael  and Kautz, Henry",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the Fourteenth Workshop on Semantic Evaluation",
    year = "2020",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2020.semeval-1.98"
}
